title: Supply Chain Manager - Porter - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Porter - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Porter. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
